channel.title: SpeakForWater
channel.description: Making water resources research accessible to everyone. Join Anna and Ehsan as they discuss the latest open-access papers on hydrology, flood management, remote sensing, and water engineering — explained in plain language for farmers, water managers, and anyone who cares about water.
channel.itunes:author: Ehsan Kahrizi

item.title: Ep 12: Modeling surface water and groundwater mixing and mixing-dependent denitrification with bedform dynamics
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 12: Modeling surface water and groundwater mixing and mixing-dependent denitrification with bedform dynamics. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1221/2026/hess-30-1221-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 11: Synergistic impact of simultaneously assimilating radar- and radiometer-based soil moisture retrievals on the performance of numerical weather prediction systems
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 11: Synergistic impact of simultaneously assimilating radar- and radiometer-based soil moisture retrievals on the performance of numerical weather prediction systems. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1261/2026/hess-30-1261-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 10: How does integrating multi-scale monitoring and compound-specific isotope analysis improve the evaluation of S -metolachlor degradation in agro-ecosystems?
item.description: SpeakForWater Episode 10: How does integrating multi-scale monitoring and compound-specific isotope analysis improve the evaluation of S -metolachlor degradation in agro-ecosystems?. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research. Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/1291/2026/hess-30-1291-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 9: Classifying pan-Arctic supra-permafrost aquifer function under present and projected conditions
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 9: Classifying pan-Arctic supra-permafrost aquifer function under present and projected conditions. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://doi.org/10.1088/1748-9326/ae358e

item.title: Ep 8: The ISLAS2020 field campaign: studying the near-surface exchange process of stable water isotopes during the arctic wintertime
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 8: The ISLAS2020 field campaign: studying the near-surface exchange process of stable water isotopes during the arctic wintertime. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://essd.copernicus.org/articles/18/1969/2026/essd-18-1969-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 7: An application of U/Th-series radiotracers to study groundwater transport processes in the surficial and Upper Floridan Aquifer System in central Florida, USA
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 7: An application of U/Th-series radiotracers to study groundwater transport processes in the surficial and Upper Floridan Aquifer System in central Florida, USA. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://public-pages-files-2025.frontiersin.org/journals/water/articles/10.3389/frwa.2025.1682438/pdf

item.title: Ep 6: Mapping water content dynamics in SAT systems using 3D electrical tomography
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 6: Mapping water content dynamics in SAT systems using 3D electrical tomography. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://hess.copernicus.org/articles/30/877/2026/hess-30-877-2026.pdf

item.title: Ep 5: The Transformation of P, Fe, and Mn Fractions in Sediment Cores of a Highly Eutrophic Estuary in Northern Taiwan
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 5: The Transformation of P, Fe, and Mn Fractions in Sediment Cores of a Highly Eutrophic Estuary in Northern Taiwan. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/5/604/pdf?version=1772524302

item.title: Ep 4: An Investigation on the Effectiveness of Horizontal Curtain Grouting Based on Multi-Method Joint Analysis: A Case Study of the Cuihongshan Iron-Polymetallic Mine
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 4: An Investigation on the Effectiveness of Horizontal Curtain Grouting Based on Multi-Method Joint Analysis: A Case Study of the Cuihongshan Iron-Polymetallic Mine. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/5/613/pdf?version=1772619329

item.title: Ep 2: Long-Term Hydrodynamic Evolution and Extreme Parameter Estimation in the Mekong River Estuary
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 2: Long-Term Hydrodynamic Evolution and Extreme Parameter Estimation in the Mekong River Estuary. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/5/620/pdf?version=1772700804

item.title: Ep 1: Climate-Driven Water Scarcity and Its Public Health Implications: A Multi-Regional Assessment Across Vulnerable Socio-Ecological Systems
item.description:
SpeakForWater Episode 1: Climate-Driven Water Scarcity and Its Public Health Implications: A Multi-Regional Assessment Across Vulnerable Socio-Ecological Systems. A podcast conversation between Anna and Ehsan discussing the latest water resources research.
Original paper: https://www.mdpi.com/2073-4441/18/6/699/pdf
